Name: ThreadDeck for Codex
Description: A bilingual Stream Deck Neo dashboard for monitoring, switching, and dictating into Codex Desktop tasks on macOS.

com.yechan.threaddeck.weekly.Name: Weekly Codex quota
com.yechan.threaddeck.weekly.Tooltip: Shows remaining weekly Codex capacity as a ring. Press to refresh now.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread1.Name: Current Codex task
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread1.Tooltip: Follows the task in Codex's active window. Tap to open it, or hold for 0.55 seconds, speak, and release to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread.top1.Name: Top Codex task 1
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread.top1.Tooltip: Tap to open the first sorted Codex task. Hold for 0.55 seconds, speak, and release to dictate and submit a follow-up. This action is independent from Current Codex task.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread2.Name: Top Codex task 2
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread2.Tooltip: Tap to open the second sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread3.Name: Top Codex task 3
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread3.Tooltip: Tap to open the third sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread4.Name: Top Codex task 4
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread4.Tooltip: Tap to open the fourth sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread5.Name: Top Codex task 5
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread5.Tooltip: Tap to open the fifth sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread6.Name: Top Codex task 6
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread6.Tooltip: Tap to open the sixth sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread7.Name: Top Codex task 7
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread7.Tooltip: Tap to open the seventh sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.thread8.Name: Top Codex task 8
com.yechan.threaddeck.thread8.Tooltip: Tap to open the eighth sorted Codex task, or hold to dictate and submit a follow-up.

com.yechan.threaddeck.sidechat.Name: Codex Side Chat
com.yechan.threaddeck.sidechat.Tooltip: Opens Side Chat with Option+Command+S and verifies that the new chat owns focus before voice, send, Fast mode, or effort actions continue.

com.yechan.threaddeck.newthread.Name: New Codex task
com.yechan.threaddeck.newthread.Tooltip: Opens a new Codex task outside the selected project.

com.yechan.threaddeck.voice.Name: Codex dictation
com.yechan.threaddeck.voice.Tooltip: Starts dictation in the current composer while held and pauses supported media. Release to leave a draft without submitting it.

com.yechan.threaddeck.send.Name: Send to Codex
com.yechan.threaddeck.send.Tooltip: Release quickly to send Return. Hold until the key turns blue, then release to send Command+Return.

com.yechan.threaddeck.appswitch.Name: Switch app
com.yechan.threaddeck.appswitch.Tooltip: Switches to the next macOS app with Command+Tab.

com.yechan.threaddeck.fastmode.Name: Codex Fast mode
com.yechan.threaddeck.fastmode.Tooltip: Toggles Fast mode for the current Codex task and shows only the verified state.

com.yechan.threaddeck.reasoning.Name: Codex effort + Fast mode
com.yechan.threaddeck.reasoning.Tooltip: Tap repeatedly to move effort up and down with immediate visual feedback. Hold for 0.6 seconds to toggle Fast mode immediately.

com.yechan.threaddeck.media.previous.Name: Previous track
com.yechan.threaddeck.media.previous.Tooltip: Moves to the previous media track.

com.yechan.threaddeck.media.playpause.Name: Play / pause media
com.yechan.threaddeck.media.playpause.Tooltip: Plays or pauses the current media.

com.yechan.threaddeck.media.next.Name: Next track
com.yechan.threaddeck.media.next.Tooltip: Moves to the next media track.

com.yechan.threaddeck.page.previous.Name: Previous page
com.yechan.threaddeck.page.previous.Tooltip: Moves to the previous page in the ThreadDeck profile.

com.yechan.threaddeck.page.next.Name: Next page
com.yechan.threaddeck.page.next.Tooltip: Moves to the next page in the ThreadDeck profile.
